body_txt: In any given Crime and Punishment Series or film, the chances of encountering a Fair Cop are high. A Fair Cop is any police officer who is ridiculously attractive, ridiculously young, or both. This should not, however, carry with it assumptions that they are dumb . Call it the police version of Good-Looking Privates . TV cops almost never have a mustache . The title is a play on the British and Australian expression "It's a fair cop", said when one admits having been caught fair and square. Indeed this character may be so sexy that some others are tempted to try Mischief for Punishment , imagining the Power Dynamics Kink of getting restrained or treated sternly by a hot officer. (But if any are ever foolish enough to do it , they generally learn that serious police work is not as titillating as they hoped.) You are not particularly likely to see a Fair Cop in a stripper's police outfit, not that this stops Stripper/Cop Confusion . However, you may see him or her as a Dirty Harriet , which gives a whole new meaning to the motto "To protect and to serve". Compare Firemen Are Hot and Good-Looking Privates . Cousin to Hot Men at Work . If you're looking for a fair- minded cop, you're probably looking for Reasonable Authority Figure or maybe a By-the-Book Cop (who usually fits). If you're looking for someone who's attracted to cops, that falls under policing as an Inherently Attractive Profession .
